description: Composition Multi-colour printed sleeveless kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, contrast printed yoke with embroidery and mirror work, green piping along the yoke and lace detailing above the vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurta from aneri. The fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the contrast coloured yoke heightens the fashion statement of this kurta. Team it with leggings and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
